if (!looksArmoredPgp && looksPlainText)
{
    var exception = new InvalidOperationException(
        $"Selected DIA file has .pgp extension but content appears to be plain text, not encrypted PGP. File: {payload.FileName}");

    _logger.LogError(
        exception,
        "Invalid DIA encrypted file format detected before decryption. FileName: {FileName}",
        payload.FileName);

    await _diaExceptionNotificationService.NotifyFailureAsync(
        payload.FileName,
        "InvalidEncryptedFileFormat",
        exception,
        cancellationToken);

    return;
}
